news-global-soc.title: NJ Transit World Cup train tickets see eyepoppingly slow sales ahead of upcoming tournament
news-global-soc.description: NJ Transit has sold less than 6% of available World Cup train tickets to MetLife Stadium despite lowering the round-trip price from $150 to $98.
